action.reasoning: Observation: Inspection shows checkpoint keys have 'backbone.' prefix matching model. Predict.py failed earlier due to missing state_dict extraction (checkpoint has 'state_dict' outer key). TTA (10-crop) can improve accuracy without new training. Time budget 2.2h, 8 iterations. Decision: rewrite predict.py to handle checkpoint loading robustly (extract state_dict if nested, strip 'module.' prefix), apply 10-crop TTA, lower batch_size to avoid OOM, and resubmit eval with existing best CLIP checkpoint. This should recover at least 0.2157 and likely surpass with TTA. No training needed now, saving time for potential DINOv2 later.
